question: Get orders with customer names
gold_sql: SELECT o.orderNumber, c.customerName FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customerNumber = c.customerNumber
gen_sql:
SELECT o."orderNumber", c."customerName"
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o."customerNumber" = c."customerNumber"

question: Get employees with office city
gold_sql: SELECT e.firstName, e.lastName, o.city FROM employees e JOIN offices o ON e.officeCode = o.officeCode
gen_sql:
SELECT e."employeeNumber", e."firstName", e."lastName", o."city"
FROM employees e
INNER JOIN offices o ON e."officeCode" = o."officeCode"

question: Get payments with customer names
gold_sql: SELECT p.checkNumber, p.amount, c.customerName FROM payments p JOIN customers c ON p.customerNumber = c.customerNumber
gen_sql:
SELECT p."customerNumber", p."checkNumber", p."paymentDate", p.amount, c."customerName"
FROM payments p
INNER JOIN customers c ON p."customerNumber" = c."customerNumber"

question: Get order details with product names

FROM orderdetails od
JOIN products p ON od."productCode" = p."productCode"

question: Get employees and their manager
